title: Chocolate-Glazed Three Layer Cheesecake
ingredients: 1/3 cup dark brown sugar, firmly packed
instructions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
Combine cookie crumbs, sugar and melted butter and mix well.
Press crumb mixture into the bottom of a 9 inch springform pan and up 2 inches on the sides.
Chill the crust.
Beat cream cheese and sugar until light and fluffy.
Add egg and vanilla to the chocolate layer mixture, blending well.
Mix in melted chocolate and sour cream.
Spoon chocolate layer mixture over crust.
Beat cream cheese, brown sugar and flour until light and fluffy.
Blend in egg and vanilla for the pecan layer.
Stir in pecans.
Carefully spoon pecan layer over chocolate layer.
Beat cream cheese and sugar for the sour cream layer until light and fluffy.
Blend in egg, sour cream, vanilla and almond extract.
Spoon sour cream layer gently over pecan layer.
Bake for 1 hour.
Turn oven off and leave cheesecake in oven for 30 minutes.
Open oven door and leave cheesecake in for another 30 minutes.
Remove from oven and cool completely.
Cover and chill for at least 8 hours.
Remove from pan and place on serving platter.
Refrigerate the cheesecake.
A couple of hours before serving, melt chocolate and butter in top of double boiler or carefully in microwave, stirring frequently.
Add powdered sugar, water and vanilla to the glaze and stir until smooth.
Spread glaze over chilled cheesecake while warm.
Remove cheesecake from refrigerator about 30 minutes before serving so glaze will soften.
Wipe knife between slices to make clean cuts.
Place slices on individual serving plates.
notes: Can be made 1-2 days ahead of time.
Cheesecake can be refrigerated after glazing, but remove from fridge about 30 minutes before serving so glaze will soften before slicing.
